Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Weapon Factory in Vibrilian.
  2. Travel to Warp Gate.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock The New Frontier: Part 2.

Quest Text

Description

Captain, we have a mission to recruit potential pilots for the new frontier in Fulzar. Visit the warp gate in Vibrilian and give them the password: GIlgam35h. This will help you to pay for the warp license to Fulzar.

Completion

Thank you for entering the password. Your reward will contain 20k steel.
